scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.build: cd client && npm run build && cd ../server && npx prisma db push --accept-data-loss && npx prisma generate && npm run build
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd server && npm run dev" "cd client && npm run dev"
scripts.prisma:push: cd server && npx prisma db push --accept-data-loss
